inputs.name: projectPath
inputs.description: Absolute path to the selected project root.

inputs.name: repositoryPath
inputs.description: Resolved repository identity hint for the selected project.

inputs.name: goalDescription
inputs.description: Required sustained-work objective entered by the user.

inputs.name: targetScopeMarkdown
inputs.description: Optional markdown block describing selected writable and read-only repositories.

inputs.name: targetRepositories
inputs.description: Optional selected repositories resolved from the preset task scope.
